---
title : Figure 4.1
subtitle : Classical convex surrogates
author : Thimoté Dupuch
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg
Pkg.activate("../..")
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie
```


```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```



```{julia}
#| output : false
zero_one(u) = -0.5 * sign.(u) .+ 0.5
hinge(u)    = max.(1 .- u, 0)
square(u)   = (u .- 1) .^ 2
logistic(u) = log.(1 .+ exp.(-u))
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
function plot_losses()
    u = -3:0.01:4

    fig = Figure(size=(500, 400))
    ax = Axis(fig[1, 1],
        title = "Classical convex surrogates for binary classification",
        limits = (-3, 4, 0, 4)
    )

    lines!(ax, u, zero_one(u), label=L"0-1 \ \text{loss} : \Phi_{0-1}(u)")
    lines!(ax, u, hinge(u), label=L"\text{Hinge} : \max \{1-u, 0\}")
    lines!(ax, u, square(u), label=L"\text{Square} : (1-u)^2")
    lines!(ax, u, logistic(u), label=L"\text{Logistic} : \log(1+e^{-u})")

    axislegend(ax)

    fig
end
```

```{julia}
plot_losses()
```
